evals.name: dom-fixture-test
evals.prompt: Add JavaScript that disables a submit button until an input has text. I want the fast unit test, not just Selenium.
evals.expected_output: Defines a DOM fixture, explicit initializer, failing JS test, minimal implementation plan, and one integration check if real page wiring changes.

evals.name: selenium-vs-js-tests
evals.prompt: This client-side behavior is covered only by a slow Selenium test. What should move into JavaScript tests?
evals.expected_output: Separates DOM-local behavior from server/browser integration, keeps a small e2e check, and warns against global state leaks.
